name: cloudgen_firewall
explanation: Barracuda CloudGen Firewall is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec defines only a `logs` template tailing a file (default example `/var/log/cloudgen_firewall.log`). There is no Agent check class under `datadog_checks/cloudgen_firewall/` (no <name>.py implementation), no metrics endpoint, and no network probe. Enabling the integration depends on whether the user has configured the firewall to ship logs to a path the Agent can read; that is a deployment policy decision, not something discoverable from the wire.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only / instrumentation-only). No check.py exists; integration is a logs config + manifest only.
